jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Jupiter Hospital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jupiter Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Jupiter Hospital:
Jupiter Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital!
